title: <title>Terry's Place · Ocala's Sports Bar & Grill Since 1980</title>
description: Family-run sports bar and grill in Ocala, FL since 1980. Half-pound burgers, hand-cut steaks, daily-baked bread. Wall-to-wall TVs, NFL Sunday Ticket, three generations.

title: <title>Menu · Terry's Place</title>
description: Hand-cut steaks, half-pound burgers, jumbo wings, daily-baked subs. Daily $10.50 lunch Mon–Fri.

title: <title>Three Generations · Terry's Place</title>
description: Family-run since 1980. Three generations behind the bar in Ocala, FL.

title: <title>Specials & Lunch · Terry's Place</title>
description: $10.50 daily lunch Mon–Fri. Sunday Football wings + pitcher special. Happy Hour weekday afternoons.

title: <title>22 TVs · Sports · Terry's Place</title>
description: NFL Sunday Ticket, Florida Gators, college football. 22 wall-to-wall screens across four rooms.

title: <title>Visit · 4121 NE 36th Ave, Ocala FL · Terry's Place</title>
description: 4121 NE 36th Ave, Ocala FL 34479. Open seven days. Free parking. (352) 732-3820.

title: <title>Contact · Terry's Place</title>
description: Catering, private events, press, or just a question — we'll get back to you.
